channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Max Hodak’s Science Corp. is preparing to place its first sensor in a human brain
item.description: Human trials on the hybrid sensor are expected to begin in the years ahead.

item.title: Google’s Spotlight-like desktop search bar for Windows is available for everyone
item.description: Last year, Google announced that it was testing a Google desktop app for Windows that resembles macOS's Spotlight feature, and now the app is available globally in English. You can download the app from Google's website, and it works with PCs with Windows 10 or newer. By pressing the Alt + Space shortcut, you can […]

item.title: How to Use Google Chrome’s New AI-Powered ‘Skills’
item.description: The premade Skills available through the Gemini sidebar in Chrome include ways to maximize protein in recipes or summarize YouTube videos.

item.title: Chrome now lets you turn AI prompts into repeatable ‘Skills’
item.description: Google is launching a new Chrome workflow feature that allows you to reuse your favorite Gemini commands across multiple webpages. Any AI prompts can now be saved as "Skills" in the Chrome desktop browser, letting you instantly run them across any tabs you select. "Until now, repeating an AI task - like asking for ingredient […]

item.title: Google adds AI Skills to Chrome to help you save favorite workflows
item.description: Google is adding “Skills” to Chrome, letting users save and reuse AI prompts across websites. The feature builds on Gemini’s browser integration.

item.title: Chrome Skills let you save your favorite Gemini prompts for easy access
item.description: Gemini in Chrome is about to get a small but handy upgrade. Starting today, Google is rolling out a feature it calls Skills to Chrome on desktop. Skills allow you to save your favorite Gemini in Chrome prompts for quick access, thereby making it easier and faster to repeat certain tasks. For instance, Google suggests you could use one saved prompt to get Gemini to calculate how much protein there could be in a new recipe you found online. Another Skill can make it easier to do a side-by-side spec comparison of a few different products you're looking at across multiple tabs. You can save ...

item.title: Nouvelle fuite de données à l’Éducation nationale : une cyberattaque a compromis les infos des élèves
item.description: Le ministère de l'Éducation nationale essuie une nouvelle fuite de données. Des informations sur les élèves ont été volées lors d'une intrusion survenue à la fin de l'année dernière. Le hack repose, une fois de plus, sur le vol d'un simple identifiant.

item.title: Anthropic’s Claude Managed Agents gives enterprises a new one-stop shop but raises vendor 'lock-in' risk
item.description: Anthropic announced a new platform last week, Claude Managed Agents, aiming to cut out the more complex parts of AI agent deployment for enterprises and competes with existing orchestration frameworks.Claude Managed Agents is also an architectural shift: enterprises, already burdened with orchestrating an increasing number of agents, can now choose to embed the orchestration logic in the AI model layer. While this comes with some potential advantages, such as speed (Anthropic proposes its customers can deploy agents in days instead of weeks or months), it also, of course, then also turns more ...

item.title: We Just Saw Behind the Scenes on ‘Godzilla Minus Zero,’ and It’s Bigger and Darker Than Ever
item.description: Writer-director Takashi Yamazaki teased his upcoming Godzilla film at CinemaCon 2026.

item.title: Google leaders including Demis Hassabis push back on claim of uneven AI adoption internally
item.description: A viral post on X from veteran programmer and former Google engineer Steve Yegge set off a rhetorical firestorm this week, drawing sharp public rebuttals from some of Google’s most prominent AI leaders and reopening a sensitive question for the company: how deeply are its own engineers really using the latest generation of AI coding tools? The debate began after Yegge summarized what he said was the view of his friend, a current and longtime Google employee (or Googler), who claimed the Gemini AI-firm's internal AI adoption looks much more ordinary and less cutting-edge than outsiders might ex...

item.title: Sony Inzone's latest monitor boasts a blazing 720Hz panel for competitive gamers
item.description: Super fast gaming displays have grown in popularity recently following the release of several new models back at CES. Now Sony is hopping on that bandwagon with its latest display featuring a tandem OLED panel from LG that offers the choice of either 540Hz or 720Hz refresh rates. That said, priced at $1,100, the new 24.5-inch Sony Inzone M10S II is only for the most dedicated and deep-pocketed gamers. In normal use, the monitor offers a 540Hz refresh rate at QHD (2,560 x 1,440). However, in competitive situations where that still might not be enough, the display can go even faster by reducing ...

item.title: OpenAI says Microsoft has ‘limited our ability’ to build customer base, praises new Amazon relationship
item.description: Microsoft was "foundational" to OpenAI's success, but the ChatGPT maker is exploring new partnerships.

item.title: This Experimental Drug Could Be a Game Changer for Pancreatic Cancer
item.description: In a Phase III trial, Revolution Medicines' daraxonrasib almost doubled the survival length of people with advanced pancreatic cancer.

item.title: How to watch Liverpool vs. PSG online for free
item.description: How to watch the Champions League for free. Watch Liverpool vs. PSG in the Champions League for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Get a spring skin glow-up with this rare discount on the Shark CryoGlow Cooling + LED Face Mask
item.description: As of April 14, get up to 20% off the Shark CryoGlow Cooling + LED Face Mask at Sephora.

item.title: How the rewards app Freecash scammed its way to the top of the app stores
item.description: Freecash was removed from Apple's App Store after TechCrunch reached out for comment.

item.title: Press freedom group asks US lawmakers for transparency over alleged VPN surveillance
item.description: Press freedom advocates are demanding urgent answers from US lawmakers after revelations that using a VPN might strip American citizens of their constitutional rights. Here's why the Freedom of the Press Foundation wants immediate limits on warrantless spy powers.

item.title: On a essayé le nouveau Mercedes CLA Shooting Brake : un break électrique bluffant et presque parfait, mais avec quelques défauts agaçants
item.description: Mercedes-Benz sort son premier break 100% électrique. Avec sa silhouette de rêve et sa technologie de pointe, le nouveau CLA Shooting Brake tente de prouver que l'élégance aérodynamique est la clé pour voyager loin sans une goutte d'essence. Avec son autonomie XXL et sa recharge ultra-rapide. Voici notre premier avis.

item.title: Meta Thinks Its Smart Glasses Could Stalk People in a ‘Thoughtful’ Way
item.description: Facial recognition but in, like, a good way.

item.title: Marvel's Spider-Man 3 development has seemingly begun as Peter Parker face model shares new behind-the-scenes photo
item.description: Insomniac Games has seemingly begun development on Marvel's Spider-Man 3.

item.title: Boulanger casse le prix de cet écran 4K Mini LED MSI (27″, 320 Hz, 0,05 ms)
item.description: Le MSI MAG 274UPDF est un écran qui ne se limite pas aux PC puisqu'il est compatible avec les dernières consoles grâce à la présence de deux ports HDMI 2.1, de l'ALLM et du VRR. Une compatibilité à découvrir pour 20 % de moins et un prix de 399,99 euros chez Boulanger.

item.title: Encore un piratage en France : l’Éducation nationale une nouvelle fois ciblée
item.description: Le ministère de l'Éducation nationale est encore une fois la cible d'un piratage informatique selon BFMTV. Les élèves sont concernés.

item.title: How to watch Atletico Madrid vs Barcelona: Free Streams for Champions League Quarter-Final 2025/26
item.description: Here's how to watch Atletico Madrid vs Barcelona in the second leg of their Champions League 2025-26 quarter-final, with Barca trailing 2-0.

item.title: Alienware has launched a new QD-OLED monitor, and I still can't believe how cheap it is
item.description: The trend of expensive OLED monitors is finally ending, and it's thanks to Alienware launching its new 27-inch QD-OLED monitor.

item.title: Moins chère et plus puissante qu’une R5 E-Tech : pourquoi la petite Nio Firefly fait-elle un tel bide en Europe ?
item.description: 50 000 unités livrées fin mars, un tarif qui ne bouge pas et quelques ajustements bien ciblés. Le constructeur chinois Nio affine sa citadine électrique Firefly sans remettre en cause ce qui fonctionne. Une auto que nous aimerions bien voir arriver en France face à la Renault 5 E-Tech ou encore la future Volkswagen ID. Polo.

item.title: How to buy Justin Biebers Shark ChillPill Personal Fan SKYLRK-Exclusive
item.description: Here's where and how to buy your own Shark ChillPill Personal Fan SKYLRK-Exclusive before it runs out of stock.

item.title: GoPro’s New Mission 1 Cameras Have 8K Video and Interchangeable Lenses
item.description: GoPro announced a new cinema-focused series of action cameras with 8K video, better low-light performance, and the ability to use Micro Four Thirds lenses.

item.title: The world’s oldest art, now in 6K IMAX
item.description: The earliest paintings were made over 32,000 years ago - the very first forms of art and culture. They weren't discovered until 1994, when cave explorers in France stumbled into the Chauvet Cave. More than a decade later, filmmaker Werner Herzog was allowed rare access to the highly guarded prehistoric site to shoot what would […]

item.title: How to watch The Dark Wizard online from anywhere
item.description: The man who turned climbing, flying, and fear into art. Here's how to watch The Dark Wizard online from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Windscribe drops crucial VPN update to bypass strict internet blocks in Iran, Russia, China
item.description: If you're struggling to stay connected in heavily restricted countries like Iran, Russia, or China, Windscribe's latest mobile app updates might be exactly what you need. Here's how the provider is fighting back against the censors.

item.title: Lucid Finds Its New CEO, Expands Robotaxi Partnership With Uber
item.description: Uber now plans to buy at least 35,000 Lucid vehicles for its global robotaxi fleet.

item.title: Mission 1 : GoPro lance ses action cams pour les pro avec un modèle à objectif interchangeable
item.description: La marque GoPro annonce la gamme de caméras MISSION 1. Une gamme de caméras pensées pour les pros, il fallait y penser.

item.title: Financial risk management platform Pillar raises $20M seed in round led by a16z
item.description: Pillar hopes to offer sophisticated, institutional-grade tools to small and medium-sized enterprises. "Our goal is to make hedging as accessible and ubiquitous as payments or accounting software," he said.

item.title: The ‘Passenger’ Trailer Invites You on a Road Trip to Literal Hell
item.description: Lou Llobell ('Foundation'), Jacob Scipio, and Melissa Leo star in the latest chiller from André Øvredal ('The Last Voyage of the Demeter').

item.title: La fonction la plus regrettée de Samsung Messages arrive chez Google
item.description: La fin programmée de Samsung Messages fait des déçus en matière de personnalisation, mais Google prépare la riposte. La célèbre application de messagerie de la firme de Mountain View devrait bientôt intégrer des options avancées pour modifier l'apparence des conversations, une fonctionnalité très prisée par les habitués des smartphones Galaxy.

item.title: Watch the closeup moment they opened the Artemis II hatch after splashdown
item.description: After NASA's Artemis II mission splashed down off the coast of California on April 10, a recovery team greeted the four astronauts.

item.title: Sony Inzone H6 Air Review: A Perfect Case for Open-Back Gaming Headsets
item.description: Sony's new open-back wired gaming headset is lighter in weight and on the wallet.

item.title: Sony’s new 1440p OLED gaming monitor seems a lot better than its first
item.description: The original InZone M10S OLED gaming monitor stood out for a mix of reasons when I reviewed it for Polygon back in late 2024 - some good (impressively small stand, high 480Hz refresh rate) and some bad (high price, low on features versus the competition). The company is launching its follow-up model, the InZone M10S […]

item.title: Sony’s latest gaming headset offers great open-back audio
item.description: Sony's PC-focused InZone brand is covering a lot of ground, now adding open-back headsets to its growing catalog of gaming accessories. The $199.99 H6 Air borrows the comfortable, easy-to-adjust design of the flagship $350 H9 II wireless headset, makes it wired, and pokes a bunch of holes in the ear cups, resulting in an open-back […]

item.title: I upgraded my AI image prompts using Gemini’s advice — specifying lighting, layouts, and even fonts changed everything
item.description: Adding simple details like lighting, aspect ratio, and text instructions to your prompts can dramatically improve the quality of AI-generated images.

item.title: This viral vinyl player looks like a 1971 Fisher-Price Music Box but with a genuine Audio-Technica cartridge — and my Record Store Day haul needs it
item.description: The Play Pro turntable from Tinyl grabbed my attention as soon as I saw it on TikTok.

item.title: This new open-back Sony gaming headset has drivers from an acclaimed studio pair at a fraction of the price
item.description: Sony has announced a new Inzone gaming monitor and headset.

item.title: Microsoft launches MAI-Image-2-Efficient, a cheaper and faster AI image model
item.description: Microsoft today launched MAI-Image-2-Efficient, a lower-cost, higher-speed variant of its flagship text-to-image model that the company says delivers production-ready quality at nearly half the price. The release, available immediately in Microsoft Foundry and MAI Playground with no waitlist, marks the fastest turnaround yet from Microsoft's in-house AI superintelligence team — and the clearest signal that Redmond is serious about building a self-sufficient AI stack that doesn't depend on OpenAI.The new model is priced at $5 per million text input tokens and $19.50 per million image output tok...

item.title: Sony expands Inzone gaming lineup with H6 Air open-back headset, OLED gaming monitor
item.description: The Sony Inzone H6 Air are the brand's new (and only) open-back gaming headphones, available April 14 along with more Inzone products.

item.title: Incendie spectaculaire chez BYD : ce qui a vraiment déclenché les flammes
item.description: Les images impressionnantes d’un incendie au siège mondial de BYD en Chine ont affolé la toile ce 14 avril 2026, relançant instantanément les débats sur la sécurité des voitures électriques. Pourtant, loin du scénario d'un emballement thermique des batteries redouté par les internautes, l'explication de ce brasier nocturne s'avère bien différente. ...

item.title: 'It's more common than you think': Experts reveal how hackers are trying to hijack your inbox with these clever tactics
item.description: There is one specific feature hackers often use to maintain persistence and exfiltrate data.

item.title: The nostalgic 8BitDo Arcade Stick is at its cheapest price in months
item.description: Nintendo Switch and PC gamers can save 16% on the 8BitDo Arcade Stick at Amazon. At $75.99, it's the lowest price in months.

item.title: 'The AirPods Pro 3 deliver the quietest ANC I’ve ever experienced' — and you can save $50 on the earbuds at Amazon
item.description: 'The AirPods Pro 3 deliver the quietest ANC I’ve ever experienced,' and Amazon just slashed $50 off the cost, bringing the price down to a near record low.

item.title: Lunettes connectées : le projet « Name Tag » de Meta suscite de vives inquiétudes
item.description: Une coalition de plus de 70 organisations demande à Meta d'abandonner son projet de lunettes connectées intégrant la reconnaissance faciale. De son côté, l’entreprise de Mark Zuckerberg assure que la reconnaissance faciale se limitera aux amis et profils publics, tout en minimisant les risques de surveillance.

item.title: In just a couple weeks, StrictlyVC San Francisco brings leaders from TDK Ventures, Replit, and more together
item.description:
The first StrictlyVC of the year will be coming to San Francisco before you know it.
There are still a few tickets available to join us and our stacked speaker lineup April 30, so register today!

item.title: Ben & Jerrys Free Cone Day is back for 2026 — how to score free ice cream on April 14
item.description: On April 14, celebrate Free Cone Day 2026 at Ben & Jerry's. Score free cups and cones of your favorite Ben & Jerry's flavors.

item.title: DaVinci Resolve adds new photo editing tools to take on Lightroom and Photoshop
item.description: Blackmagic Design announced an update to its powerful multipurpose post-production software today adding new tools and improved workflows for editing photos. In addition to helping position DaVinci Resolve 21 as an alternative to Adobe's Lightroom and Photoshop, the latest version also introduces new features to lure users away from Adobe Premiere including AI tools that […]...

item.title: I launched a successful fitness side hustle on Wix: Here is what worked and what didn't, a two-year reflection
item.description: From outstanding automations to AI assistant flops – learn from my mistakes and successes

item.title: Mid-Aprils free Legos include a Lego taco stand or mini TIE fighter
item.description: Lego Insiders get the Restaurants of the World: Mexico collectible set just for spending $180. Yes, preorders count toward the promo.

item.title: Anthropic Opposes the Extreme AI Liability Bill That OpenAI Backed
item.description: Anthropic and OpenAI are clashing over a proposed Illinois law that would let AI labs largely off the hook for mass deaths and financial disasters.

item.title: Comment créer un groupe WhatsApp et le gérer ?
item.description: Les groupes font partie des fonctionnalités phares de WhatsApp. Voici comment en créer un, y inviter des personnes et en gérer l'administration.

item.title: Ecovacs Deebot Mini : 199 €, c’est le super prix de ce tout petit robot aspirateur-laveur, livré avec une station qui lave et sèche ses serpillières
item.description: Très compact, polyvalent et accompagné d'une station de vidange complète, l'Ecovacs Deebot Mini est un robot aspirateur-laveur qui ne manque pas d'atouts. Actuellement, Amazon le propose à 199 euros au lieu de 299 euros.
